[CORE FILE – DO NOT MODIFY WITHOUT USER APPROVAL]

[MINOR CHARACTER PROFILE – RIVERDALE & REGION]

Name: Martha Greenfield
Occupation: Librarian
Description: Mid-60s, silver hair in a bun. Knows every book by smell. Claims the restricted section reorganizes itself.

Name: Deputy Cal Rourke
Occupation: Local law enforcement
Description: Late 40s, mustache, skeptic. Carries salt in his cruiser. Doesn't talk about the incident at the old mill.

Name: Dr. Faye Ashton
Occupation: Veterinarian
Description: Early 30s, colorful scrubs, nervous laugh. Animals behave strangely around certain clients. She notices but says nothing.
